objective: Replay release readiness after P4 build lock inputs were committed and pushed, without creating DRD_HARNESS_RELEASE_LOCK or publishing packages.
why_ready: P4_BUILD_LOCK and its approved build-lock creation result are now committed in the source git commit used by this replay.
Release readiness packet has no missing gates and clean dirty-state records.
Golden, integration, release, package, example, and migration evidence are hash-bound.
next_action: P4 release readiness is approved. Release lock input bundle creation, release lock creation, publishing, commit, and push still require separate explicit authorization.
approval_notes: Approved by explicit user pass after clean P4 release readiness candidate review.
This approval validates the PASS readiness packet and hashed release evidence only.
This approval does not create a release lock input bundle, create DRD_HARNESS_RELEASE_LOCK, publish a package, commit, or push.
